01
OUR PURPOSE

"With the Power of Chemistry,
We Support the Future of Industry."

Philosophy / Purpose

Synthesize. Innovate. Connect.

Founded in 1978, Qualipoly develops and manufactures synthetic resins for coatings, printing, electronics, and construction industries worldwide.

Three platforms — UV-curable, electronic, and functional resins — supply global markets from Taiwan. Partnerships with leading chemical firms in Japan, Europe, and North America deliver world-class quality.

VISION 2030

"Supporting Next-Generation Industries
for Next-Gen CCL, PCB & Beyond"

  • Concentrated investment in high-performance resin systems for CCL and electronics
  • Tainan New Plant: 30,000 MT/year UV resin capacity
  • PSMA resin expansion into PCB curing agents and inorganic binders
  • Accelerating R&D in low-Df resins and AI-ready electronic materials

03
OUR HISTORY

Five Decades of Growth —
Built on Resins.

From UP resins in 1978 to advanced electronic materials today — five decades of focused growth, strategic alliances, and market expansion.

C O M P A N Y H I S T O R Y

Foundation
Established in Kaohsiung to produce UP resins, alkyd, and acrylic emulsions.
UV Entry
UV-curable resin business launched. Jiangmen Plant (China) established. TWSE listing achieved.
Tainan Expansion
Tainan UV plant reaches 30,000 MT. North American startup investment and PSMA expansion initiated.
Vision 2030
Target: leading supplier of electronic resins, PSMA, and specialty UV.
1978
1980s
2000s
2010s
2022
2024
2030 ▶
Western Alliance
Formed technology alliances with Ashland, Neste, and other Western leaders in UP resins and coatings.
Electronics Entry
UV Second Plant completed. UV business expanded with IGM; electronic material toll manufacturing launched with JSR.
Dedicated Line
Electronic ResinsDedicated electronic resin line (2,000 MT) and PSMA expansion break ground.

THREE BUSINESS PILLARS × INDUSTRY APPLICATIONS

QPC's Three Resin Platforms Serving Diverse Industries

06
UV
Qualipoly × UV-Curable Resins

Curing with Light, Accelerating Industry

UV-Curable Resins

40,000 MT/Year Capacity
with 40,000 MT/Year Capacity

Instant-cure UV resins span inkjet inks, 3D printing, adhesives, solder masks, photoresists, and underfills. Dual-plant network (Kaohsiung + Tainan) delivers 40,000 MT/year.

Specialty grades (low metal ion, halogen-free, EO/PO-modified monomers) meet the high-purity requirements of electronics and semiconductor applications. Technical partnerships with Japanese and European chemical companies ensure world-class quality.

Monofunctional Monomers (TDA/LMA/IDMA) Multifunctional Monomers (TMPTA/DPHA) Urethane / Epoxy Oligomers Photoinitiators / Amine Co-initiators Low Metal Ion / Halogen-Free Grades
20,000MT
Tainan — Monomers
10,000MT

5,000MT

5,000MT
Kaohsiung — Oligomers
07
Electronic Resins

High-Performance Electronic Resins
for Next-Gen CCL & PCB

AI, 5G/6G, and EV growth demand higher-performance CCL. Qualipoly delivers low-Df, high heat-resistant resin systems to global manufacturers.

Applications include CCL, CMP, fiber optic coatings, and semiconductor packaging. Dedicated 2,000 MT/year line launching 2026 supports semiconductor toll manufacturing.

5G Materials (High Tg / Low Df) PSMA Curing Agent (PCB / Inorganic Materials) Electronic Ink UV Resins Fiber Optic Coating Resins
2,000MT
Electronic ResinsDedicated Line（2026 from 2026)
3,000MT

11
FUTURE PLAN 2026–2030

Toward Higher Value.
Qualipoly's Growth Strategy.

Pivoting toward electronic resins and specialty UV. Taiwan plants repositioned as R&D and high-performance resin centers.

01

Production Portfolio Optimization

UP and coating production consolidated at Jiangmen. Kaohsiung repositioned as a specialty facility for electronic resins, PSMA, and UV.

PRODUCTION SHIFT
02

Electronic Resins Business Expansion

Scaling CCL-grade electronic resin systems. Entering semiconductor contract manufacturing. Targeting AI and high-speed communications growth.

ELECTRONIC GROWTH
03

PSMA & UV Diversification

PSMA expanded into printing plates and inorganic binders. UV monomers diversified into coatings, adhesives, and electronic inks.

DIVERSIFICATION
04

R&D Investment Acceleration

Intensifying low-Df resin R&D for next-gen CCL. Proactive portfolio targeting AI, high-speed comms, and EV demand.

R&D ACCELERATION
